title: SHALL-120pcs Sanding Sheets Rectangular, 93x185mm Sander Sandpaper 8 Holes Hook and Loop Sanding Pads,Assorted 40/60/80/120/180/240 Grits
features: 【Comprehensive】Suitable for most power tool brands of orbital sanders, 20 sheets for each grit size, 40, 60, 80, 120, 180, 240#, 120 sheets in total. From coarse to fine, meet your needs
【HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL】 - Due to the high quality aluminum oxide, the sandpaper is durable, anti-static, long-lasting, strong and stable even during longer sanding jobs.
[Easy to use] Velcro design, easy and fast to stick on the sander, reverse flocking has strong adsorption force, not easy to fall off, safe to use
[Size] 18.5 x 9.3cm, pre-punched with 8 holes for dust removal, suitable for rectangular sanders
[Scope of application] Widely used for grinding and polishing metal and non-metal, wood, leather, plastic, stone, glass and other materials
description: Product Description There are 20 sheets of each grain size in sizes 40, 60, 80, 120, 180, 240#, 120 sheets in total. From coarse to fine, meet your needs The larger the particle size, the finer the grinding 3-layer material, high-strength resin bonding system increases the service life of the sandpaper What do you get?
